title: zephyranthes chloroleuca
intro: Zephyranthes chloroleuca, also known as the yellow rain lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Zephyranthes chloroleuca include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections due to its antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
